primary_use: Persistent state, routing, MCM, debug, or shared helper owner
xedit_review: QUST VMAD, script properties, duplicate script rows
runtime_acceptance: New game starts service, save/load preserves expected state, logs stay clean

primary_use: Capture vanilla event surface and route to owned service
ck_surface: Quest Data Event, Story Manager node
xedit_review: Receiver QUST VMAD and event-node-related overrides where visible
runtime_acceptance: Valid event routes, rejected event skips, repeated events do not wedge receiver

primary_use: Attach runtime event handling to actor/reference/location selected by quest
ck_surface: Quest Alias Tab, alias Scripts tab
xedit_review: Alias VMAD, fill target, script properties
runtime_acceptance: Alias fills, event fires, optional failure is safe, unregister path works

primary_use: Player-facing dialogue, branches, topics, infos, forcegreet, scene entry
ck_surface: Dialogue Views Tab, Player Dialogue Tab
runtime_acceptance: Dialogue appears only for intended actors and states from first load

primary_use: One-shot milestone signal from quest progression
xedit_review: Stage data, result scripts, fragment VMAD
runtime_acceptance: Normal and forced stage paths emit one intended signal

primary_use: Inspect script/property state after CK saves or patching
ck_surface: Scripts tabs and fragment property UI
xedit_review: VMAD scripts, properties, stale rows, duplicate same-name scripts
runtime_acceptance: Runtime path reaches wired forms and old-save risk is resolved or documented

primary_use: Confirm generated files are packaged and not shadowed
xedit_review: Plugin diff plus generated output folders
runtime_acceptance: Game sees the same files intended for release
